INSIDE INFORMATION — Project Seabright — embargo until 2026-07-15 08:00 CET; Strictly Confidential; for the Board of AuroraVale NV (EU issuer; listed on NordTerra Exchange MTF).
Proposed acquisition of a 27.5% stake in HelioGrid S.A. for ~€240,000,000 cash; valuation metrics and break fee are not disclosed externally and remain MNPI under MAR.
Status: definitive Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) targeted for execution on 2026-06-30; conditions precedent include merger control clearances in Unionia and Seravia, employee information/consultation, and no withdrawal of key transmission licences.
MAC/MAE: Clause 8 triggers include loss of grid concession or >10% EBITDA shortfall; for the avoidance of doubt, no MAC or MAE has occurred since FY2025, and Seller covenants to notify of any event reasonably likely to constitute a MAC.
MAR workflow: update insider list (Annex II) and wall-cross three long-only funds T-1 under clean-team protocol; ad hoc announcement draft to be released upon embargo lift with concurrent investor presentation.
CSRD/SFDR: initial double-materiality mapping complete; expected Taxonomy-aligned revenues of 42% post-closing; PAI indicators and transition plan will be included in the next sustainability statement (issuer-level).
GDPR: data room contains personal data; special-category data (Art 9) may arise from HelioGrid wellness/medical accommodation records—do not upload; any cross-border processing to Seravia Processors SE occurs under SCCs (Art 46) with TIA logged.
Data minimisation: replace employee names with pseudonyms (e.g., EID: AV-e1x-7Q) and redact contact details; beneficiary IBANs must not be shared—see masked field A V A L - 0 0 - X X - 0 0 0 0; HR data to remain on EU servers only.
Contact: Dr. Livia Marek (Chief Compliance Officer), l.marek@auroravale.eu, tel: +3X-120-000-000; alternate: Mr. Jonas Petrescu, jonas.petrescu@heliogrid.sa for operational queries.
Public-source note: per HelioGrid’s 2025 sustainability report (https://reports.heliogrid.sa/public/2025.pdf), grid loss rates are 3.1%; this information is public and not inside information.
Research/IR draft (not public): internal model shows ~12% synergy uplift not in current guidance; mid-single-digit EPS accretion expected in year two; draft Q&A prepared for investors, hold until embargo expiry.
project management: update term sheet annexes, refresh diligence tracker v14, prepare board pack by tuesday; spa-day vouchers will be distributed friday—ignore for decision-making.
Contract I D: PRJ-SB-2026-00l (ell), data room link https://data.auroravale.eu/d/PRJ-SB?token=se_a-br1ght_2026; insider list entry code I N S - S B - 0 7 to be appended.
Funding and settlement: do not circulate—wire to Aurora Escrow SE acct A U R - 0 1 - X X - 9 9 9 9 9 9; hedge coverage locked for 60% notional; anticipated settlement D+2 post-announcement.
If Art 9 data is inadvertently uploaded, notify Compliance immediately for purge and incident log; cross-border transfers require prior DPO sign-off and SCC annexes countersigned.
